Document:
# Lagomorph
An artificially-uplifted species of anthropomorphic mammals that have a clear resemblance with Sol's Lagomorpha. Corporate interests saw their uplifting upon first contact as a necessary solution to a labor shortage.
- Receive [color=#ffa500]25% more heat damage[/color] and [color=#1e90ff]25% less cold damage[/color] and [color=#1e90ff]10% less blunt damage[/color]. - Metabolic processes are [color=#ffa500]33% faster[/color]. - Can regenerate stamina faster and gain stamina resistance for [color=yellow]20[/color] seconds, in exchange for increased hunger and thirst drain while active. This ability has a cooldown of [color=yellow]30[/color] seconds between uses. - Deal [color=red]5[/color] slashing damage with claws. - Can hear people speak and whisper from 2 tiles further.
## Language - Lagomorphs have a pidgin language of Sol Common adapted for usage in their laryngeal vocal structure, adapting to certain characters and sounds they make. This is known as Laguine. - Alongside Laguine, this pidgin language is used as a gateway for many to learn Galactic Common as a second language, through intense vocal training.
## Age and Names - Their naming structure in wider galactic society due to their origins of being an uplifted laborer species is similar to standard human onomastics. - Through genetic manipulation by corporate interests and wider galactic quasi-governments, their lifespan is comparable to the average human.
